oauth.title: ANAF OAuth authorization
oauth.descDisconnected: authorize the app in SPV for e-Factura submission and sync

secret.title: OAuth client secret
secret.desc: stored in the system keychain · the value is never displayed

cert.title: Qualified certificate
cert.descNone: no certificate registered — captured automatically on the first SPV authorization

advanced.title: Advanced OAuth configuration
advanced.desc: Client ID, Redirect URI and the ANAF URLs for your own OAuth app
advanced.bannerP1: To connect to SPV, ANAF requires your own OAuth app: in SPV → "Gestionare profil OAuth" register the app (with the Redirect URI below) and you will receive a
advanced.bannerP3: . Fill them in here. The remaining fields can stay empty (default values).
advanced.clientIdHint: Generated by ANAF when registering the OAuth app
advanced.secretHintSet: Saved in the keychain — leave empty to keep it
advanced.secretHintNew: Generated by ANAF; stored securely in the keychain

work.title: Working company
work.desc: the invoice series and numbering are configured per company (Companies › Edit)

spv.title: SPV enabled
spv.desc: the company sends and receives documents through SPV

vat.title: VAT rates — legislative history (Law 141/2025)
vat.note: Invoices and credit notes for earlier periods automatically use the rates in force at the chargeable-event date.

periodLocks.title: Locked fiscal periods
periodLocks.desc: Periods locked automatically when declarations are exported, or manually by the accountant. Unlock a period only when filing a rectifying declaration — unlocking allows GL entries to be regenerated and documents in the period to be modified.
periodLocks.loadError: Error while loading the locked periods.
periodLocks.confirmMsg:
Unlock the period {{period}}?

This action allows GL entries to be regenerated and invoices in this period to be modified. Proceed only if you are filing a rectifying declaration.

full.title: Full backup (ZIP)
full.desc: database + document archive — choose where the file is saved

export.title: Company archive export (XML + PDF)
export.desc: exports the active company's XML and PDF files into a ZIP

folder.title: Archive folder
folder.desc: open the archive location or move the archive to another folder

integrity.title: Integrity check
integrity.desc: checks that all archived files of the active company exist on disk

restore.title: Restore from ZIP
restore.desc: restoring overwrites the current data and restarts the app

export.title: Personal data export
export.desc: ZIP archive with the database + document archive (export_all_my_data)

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.desc: lucaris.ro/privacy — how your data is stored and used

wipe.title: Delete account and all data
wipe.descPre: fiscal documents (invoices, journals, declarations) stay archived for
wipe.descPost: under the legal retention obligation — only non-mandatory personal data is deleted

modal.title: Total deletion — confirmation
modal.subtitle: This action is irreversible
modal.bannerP1: submitted invoices, journals and declarations CANNOT be deleted — the law requires keeping them for
modal.bannerP2: from the end of the financial year. They remain archived read-only. Permanently deleted: the user account, preferences, uninvoiced contacts and marketing data.

template.title: Invoice template (PDF)
template.subtitle: the visual look of the generated PDF

preset.label: Preset
preset.hint: Defines which PDF elements are colored.

accent.label: Accent color
accent.hint: Applied according to the chosen preset (#RRGGBB).

header.label: Custom header
header.hint: Below the issue date — slogan / legal mentions (max 2 lines).

footer.label: Custom footer
footer.hint: At the end of the invoice — thanks / payment terms (max 3 lines).
footer.ph:
Thank you for your business!
Payment within 15 days of issue.

words.title: Amount in words
words.desc: Shows the total written out in words below TOTAL.

vatDetail.title: VAT breakdown
vatDetail.desc: Shows the table of taxable bases per rate.

modal.title: Demo PDF preview
modal.live: reacts live to the template settings

mock.buyerLine: Mavericks SRL · RO 22418890 · Cluj-Napoca, Cluj county
mock.name: Description

modal.liveNote: Live mock — the real PDF is generated identically, locally
modal.openRealTitle: Generates the real demo PDF with the company identity and opens it

row.title: SmartBill — invoice submission
row.desc: sends the current invoice to your SmartBill account (per invoice) · requires user + API token

license.noneDesc: start the free trial from the Help menu or activate a key

theme.title: Interface theme
theme.desc: switch between the light, dark or system theme

density.title: Row density
density.desc: row height in tables and lists

feedback.title: Support and feedback

message.label: Message (optional)
message.ph: Describe the problem or suggestion (diagnostics are attached automatically)…

feedback.autoRest: version {{v}}, operating system, anonymized machine ID, the last 50 log lines. Clicking opens your email client.

updates.title: Updates
updates.prompt: check whether a new version is available
updates.available: New version available: {{v}}. Download it from the website.
updates.upToDate: The app is up to date.
updates.failed: Could not check for updates (server unavailable).

autostart.title: Start automatically at login
autostart.desc: starts the app automatically when you sign in to the system

dev.title: Development

demo.title: Demo data
demo.desc: seeds the database with test data (empty DB only)

dev.confirmMsg: Seed the database with test data? It only works if the DB is empty.
dev.seedFailed: Seeding failed or the DB is not empty.

notify.licenseActivateFailed: The license could not be activated.
notify.anafAdvancedSaveError: Error saving the advanced ANAF configuration.
notify.emailReady: Email prepared in your email client
notify.emailFailed: Cannot open the email client — send manually to support@lucaris.ro
notify.archiveFolderFailed: Could not open the archive folder.
notify.integrityOk_one: The archive is intact. {{count}} file checked.
notify.integrityOk_other: The archive is intact. {{count}} files checked.
notify.integrityRetention: , {{n}} under the legal 5-year retention period — L82/1991
notify.wiped: All your data has been deleted. The app will restart.
notify.autostartFailed: Could not change the autostart setting.

dialogs.restoreMsg: This will replace the current database with the selected backup. The operation cannot be undone.
dialogs.gdprExportSaveTitle: Choose where to export your data.
dialogs.gdprRetentionAck: Do you confirm that you exported/archived the documents and accept responsibility for complying with the legal retention period?

payrollConfig.title: Payroll configuration
payrollConfig.subtitle: GL accounts used when posting payroll entries. Defaults are compliant with OMFP 1802/2014. Only change if you use analytics.

diurna.title: Per-diem allowances
diurna.subtitle: Tax Code art. 76(2)(k) + art. 142(g). Non-taxable ceiling = 2.5 × daily rate.

rates2026.title: 2026 rates & ceilings
rates2026.note: Set by law (Tax Code, EGO 89/2025, GD 146/2026); updated via software.
